programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: Sebastian goes under cover; Patton practices his old gambling skills; Pride and the team embark on a perilous plan to trap Garcia.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a retired FBI agent is tortured and killed while working a security job, Scola and Nina go undercover as a married couple deep in the diamond game as the team tries to find out who is responsible.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After an FDIC security guard is killed while tending to a pregnant woman in distress, the team works to locate the woman and the killer who took her hostage; OA and Isobel worry about Maggie as she navigates taking care of Ella.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team is thrown into a highly political case after four members of the Taliban are shot and one is kidnapped in New York with no record of their entrance into the country; OA struggles to open up to Gemma about his past in Afghanistan.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a truck driver is murdered and the drug he was transporting goes missing, the team hunts for those behind the remaining batch that is already wreaking havoc on the streets of New York.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The Somalian terrorist group behind the death of Agent Hobbs resurfaces, sending the team on a chase to take them down for good.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a bomb explosion devastates a residential apartment building, special agents Maggie Bell and Omar Adom "OA" Zidan of the New York office of the FBI investigate a possible war between rival gangs.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: To stop a dangerous virus from spreading, Team Scorpion must locate an endangered monkey in the Amazon that has the antibody for the cure; Toby and Happy see a counselor to prepare for matrimony.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: The team races to save Paige and Happy when a wire supporting the gondola they are in during a mission to repair a turbine at a wind farm snaps.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: The team defies the orders of a foreign government when it retrieves an asteroid containing DNA strands that could have deadly consequences if they are exposed.

programme.desc: The team attempts to extract a pair of scientists trapped inside a failing and dangerous bio-dome designed for Mars.

programme.desc: Team Scorpion has little hope for rescue after their plane crash-lands on a remote, deserted island while en route to Toby and Happy's honeymoon.

programme.desc: After thousands of classified government files are stolen, the NCIS team searches for an underground group of hackers who were co-founded by Elvis Bertrand, Pride's old contact.

programme.desc: Painful memories come flooding back when a gruesome copycat murder leads to the reopening of a case for Wade.

programme.desc: After eight people are fatally poisoned at a deli in New York City, agents Maggie Bell and OA Zidan trace the crime to an unlikely culprit and conduct a sting operation to prevent further attacks.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Special agents Maggie Bell and OA Zidan join the team to investigate the murders of 18 young women, and they get help from a survivor associated with the deceased.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a senator's daughter is kidnapped and held for ransom, the FBI must find the little girl before their time limit expires; they must dig into the senator's past for clues to who did this to his family.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The death of a prison gang member leads Fontana and Green to suspect the victim's former associates until they learn the deceased also had a running battle with a hard-nosed corrections officer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives investigate the deaths of two college students and find both were participating in a pharmaceutical company's secret testing program for an antidepressant that has resulted in many suicides.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An illegal firearms sting backfires when two officers are slain, and Green poses as a gun buyer to try to capture the killers, who were able to identify the officers via a Web site identifying undercover cops.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy must determine whether charges should be filed in civil court or in criminal court when a novelist's death seems to have been caused by careless liposuction, but Branch finds a recurring pattern of negligence by the doctor.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy takes the issue of gay marriage before the state's Supreme Court when he is unable to compel a man to testify against a crooked developer because the two say they are married.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives proceed with skeptical caution when a radio personality, known to stage fake muggings for publicity, claims to have been shot and almost killed.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A philandering jeweler with ties to the Russian mob is one of four people shot to death on a sidewalk, and Fontana and Green learn the victim was cooperating with federal authorities until his murder.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: After a bloody massacre of heroin dealers, Fontana and Green pinpoint a drug-dealing Afghan warlord as their primary suspect, and McCoy and Southerlyn prosecute despite pressure from the State Department.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Fontana and Green reluctantly investigate after a motorist strikes a child-murderer and leaves him for dead, and the evidence they uncover leads McCoy to a startling discovery.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a wealthy venture-capitalist is found dead in his home, Fontana and Green zero in on the victim's young wife (Andrea Roth) and her contractor boyfriend (Daniel Sunjata).

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Evidence in the shooting death of a rap legend seems to point to his young protege (Sean Nelson), who has been cutting his own music on bootleg CDs, so Fontana and Green listen for clues in the lyrics.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When nine flu victims suddenly die, Green and Fontana learn that all had been injected with a fake vaccine, which leads to the arrest and prosecution of a longtime con man.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a controversial conservative talk-show host is shot to death, detectives sift through many possible suspects, eventually focusing on the man's widow and a woman who may have been stalking her.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A man strangled in his rent-controlled apartment leads detectives to the building's owner, who wants to convert the building to a co-op, but a basketball player's fingerprints are found at the scene.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dirty Dancing
programme.desc: Baby (Jennifer Grey) is one listless summer away from the Peace Corps. Hoping to enjoy her youth while it lasts, she's disappointed when her summer plans deposit her at a sleepy resort in the Catskills with her parents. Her luck turns around, however, when the resort's dance instructor, Johnny (Patrick Swayze), enlists Baby as his new partner, and the two fall in love. Baby's father forbids her from seeing Johnny, but she's determined to help him perform the last big dance of the summer.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Steel Magnolias
programme.desc: M'Lynn (Sally Field) is the mother of bride-to-be Shelby Eatenton (Julia Roberts), and as friend Truvy Jones (Dolly Parton) fixes the women's hair for the ceremony, they welcome a helping hand from aspiring beautician Annelle Dupuy DeSoto (Daryl Hannah). Diabetic Shelby has a health scare, which is averted but doesn't bode well for her hopes of having children. Time passes, and the women and their friends encounter tragedy and good fortune, growing stronger and closer in the process.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
